generative-ai-data
******************


Description
===========

A description of the ReferenceService CLI. in progress


Available Commands
==================

* cancel-enrichment-job

  * enrichment-job

    * cancel

* generate-enrichment-job

  * enrichment-job

    * generate

* generate-sql-from-nl-job

  * generate-sql-from-nl

* get-enrichment-job

  * enrichment-job

    * get

* list-enrichment-jobs

  * enrichment-job-collection

    * list-enrichment-jobs
